# Nexoras

> Nexoras is an AI-powered productivity and learning platform for students and early-career professionals: study planner, smart calculators, resume builder, mock interviews, JEE/EAMCET/BITSAT prep, and career guidance.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Nexoras AI study and career platform.
- [About](/about): Mission, team, and what Nexoras builds.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the Nexoras team.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans and pricing for Nexoras.
- [Tools](/tools): All AI productivity tools in one place.
- [Calculators](/calculators): Smart academic calculators (CGPA, percentage, more).
- [Resume Builder](/resume): AI-assisted resume builder with templates and PDF export.
- [Mock Interviews](/mock-interview): AI + HR mock interview practice.
- [Mock Tests](/mock-tests): Timed mock tests for entrance exams.
- [Practice](/practice): Practice questions and PYQs.
- [Roadmaps](/roadmaps): Career roadmaps for students.
- [Engineering Roadmaps](/engineering-roadmaps): Branch-wise engineering guidance.
- [Future Careers](/future-careers): AI-era career paths.
- [Crack JEE](/crack-jee): JEE Main and Advanced preparation hub.
- [Competitive Exams](/competitive-exams): EAMCET, MHT CET, BITSAT and more.
- [Courses](/courses): Curated learning programs.
- [Career](/career): Career planning and guidance.

## Blog

- [Blog](/blog): Long-form guides on AI, productivity, resume building, and careers.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How Nexoras handles user data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service): Terms governing use of Nexoras.
